creator: gerard@seibercom.net
text:
When using portmanager to update the ports, the following error is 
displayed:

** Error occured reading /usr/local/etc/pkgtools.conf:
        undefined method `x11base' for nil:NilClass
** Error occured reading /usr/local/etc/pkgtools.conf:
        undefined method `x11base' for nil:NilClass

It is reported twice exactly as shown above. Then as portmanager continues 
the updating process, the message will be displayed again from time to 
time.

This has only started recently. I believe after the last update of 
portupgrade if I remember correctly.

Fix: 

Unknown
How-To-Repeat: Simply use portmanager in an attempt to update the system.
